name: erc20
context: ERC-20 fungible token standard — transfer, approve, query balances
info: Full support for the ERC-20 token standard. Covers balance queries, transfers, approvals, allowance management, and event listening. Works with any ERC-20 compliant token on any EVM chain.

scripts.name: Get Token Balance
scripts.description: Query ERC-20 token balance for an address

RPC_URL.description: JSON-RPC endpoint for the target chain

scripts.name: Transfer Tokens
scripts.description: Transfer ERC-20 tokens to a recipient

RPC_URL.description: JSON-RPC endpoint for the target chain

author: dojo-community

sections.title: Approve + TransferFrom
sections.body: The two-step approval pattern is the most important ERC-20 concept. A user approves a spender (usually a DEX or lending protocol) for a specific amount. The spender then calls transferFrom to move tokens. Infinite approvals (type(uint256).max) are common but risky — revoke unused approvals.

sections.title: Decimals and precision
sections.body: ERC-20 amounts are always in the smallest unit (like wei for ETH). A token with 18 decimals stores 1.0 as 1000000000000000000. Use ethers.formatUnits() or similar to convert for display. Never do math on formatted strings.

related.note: Multi-token standard that handles both fungible and non-fungible
